comments:
I have a version of this saved in my angst collection (another uploader, I guess). So I'm gonna write my review here too (because of course, I read this too)

For FTRs. This is an extremely sad story, for me. And I loved it. It’s heart-wrenching. Some may say, this is a bad ending, and I disagree. But it’s just a sad ending.  I always cry whenever I reread this. The only makeup for this kind of ending is a rebirth, but this is not that kind of story.  So you will be left with heartache.

But again… I love it.
🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟
